title: Doraji and Norwegian Salmon Stir Fry
description: Quick and easy Chinese-inspired stir fry with doraji and Norwegian salmon. Serve with steamed vegetables for a nutritious meal.
instructions: 1. Cook the bake according to package instructions and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce (if using), and 1 tablespoon vegetable oil.
3. Add the salmon fillets to the marinade and refrigerate for at least 15 minutes.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
5. Add the garlic and ginger to the skillet and stir-fry for 1 minute.
6. Remove the salmon from the marinade and add to the skillet. Cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
7. Add the cooked bake to the skillet and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
8. Add the doraji flowers to the skillet and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, or until wilted.
9. Season with sesame oil and serve hot.
10. Garnish with chopped scallions and serve immediately.
